source_note: Verified against FTMO official comparison table (ftmo.oanda.com) and multiple 2026 reviews. Targets 10%/5%, daily loss 5% of start-of-day balance, max loss 10% STATIC of initial, min 4 trading days/phase, unlimited time, no consistency rule. News restriction applies to FUNDED standard accounts, not the Challenge/Verification, so evaluation = allowed. Fee ~EUR540 list price for the 100K tier; USD site/promos differ (display shows a $ sign) - treat fee as approximate.
size_tiers_note: Only the 100K fee ($540) is verified. Other sizes ESTIMATED from typical CFD prop-firm price ratios (needs per-size verification at the firm's checkout).
needs_verification: size_tiers: only 100K fee confirmed; other sizes estimated
